# terrible_community_general_pacemaker_cluster (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the cluster. The value `maintenance` has been added in community.general 11.1.0.

### Optional

- `force` (Boolean) Force the change of the cluster state.
- `name` (String) Specify which node of the cluster you want to manage. `null` == the cluster status itself, `all` == check the status of all nodes.
- `timeout` (Number) Timeout period (in seconds) for polling the cluster operation.

### Read-Only

- `out` (String) The output of the current state of the cluster. It returns a list of the nodes state.
